story: World Cup 2026: Belgium lose to Spain and exit World Cup - BBC
title: Spain Advances to Semis
script: Spain beats Belgium with Merino's winner. This loss eliminates Belgium from the tournament, a significant upset in the World Cup. The Spanish team is gaining momentum with six games remaining, and their chances of advancing are looking strong. Erling Haaland mania is also taking over, but Spain's win is a major turning point. Anti-discrimination reports have been filed, and the tournament is getting intense. Will Spain keep finding a way to win it all now?
